flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Ilisagvik College fell 30% between 2021 and 2024 (179 → 126).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Ilisagvik College rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($4.8k → $5.3k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Ilisagvik College rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($4.8k → $5.3k).
